td.span: For SJS Enersol Engineering Works L.L.C.

tr.td: Hex Bolt, Stud Bolt, Anchor Bolt And Heavy Engineering Construction

pdf.body:
<#list record.item?chunk(10) as itemBatch>
    
    
      

        
          
            Tax Proforma Invoice
          
        
      
    
    

    
    
        

            
          
    Bill To,

    
        ${record.entity}

        ${record.billaddress?replace("
","
")}
    

            
            
            
            
                Date

                P.I No

                Payment Terms

                Order No
            
            
            
                : ${record.trandate}

                : ${record.tranid}

                : ${record.terms}

                : ${record.otherrefnum}
            
        
    
    
    
        

             TRN:   
            ${record.vatregnum}
        
        

            Tel: 
            ${record.entity.phone}
            Fax: 
            ${record.entity.fax}
        
    
    

    
    
        
            

                S. No.
                Description
                Units
                Quantity
                Rate ${record.currency}
                Total ${record.currency}
                5% VAT ${record.currency}
                Net Total ${record.currency}
            
        
        <#list itemBatch as item>
        

            ${item_index + 1 + (itemBatch?index * 10)}
            ${item.description}
            ${item.units}
            ${item.quantity?string("0.00")}
            ${item.rate?string("0.00")}
            ${item.amount?string("0.00")}
            ${item.tax1amt?string("0.00")}
            ${item.grossamt?string("0.00")}
        
        </#list>
        <#if !itemBatch?has_next>
        
        

            Total
            ${record.subtotal?string("0.00")}
            ${record.taxtotal?string("0.00")}
            ${record.total?string("0.00")}
        
        <#else>
        
        

            
        
        </#if>
    
    <#if !itemBatch?has_next>
        
        

        

            Amount in Words:

           ${record.currency} ${customData.totalWords?upper_case} ONLY
        
        

        
            

                
                
                    A/C Title: SJS Enersol Engineering Works LLC

                    A/C No: 116-535379200-01

                    IBAN No: AE28 0030 0116 5353 7920 001

                    Bank Name: Abu Dhabi Commercial Bank

                    Swift Code: ADCBAEAA

                    A/C Currency: ${record.currency}
                
                
                
                    
                
                
                
                    
                        

                            Discount Amt
                            ${record.discounttotal?string("0.00")}
                        
                        

                            Gross Amount
                            ${record.subtotal?string("0.00")}
                        
                        

                            VAT
                            ${record.taxtotal?string("0.00")}
                        
                        

                            Net Total:
                            
                                ${record.total?string("#,##0.00")}
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
    <#else>
        
        
    </#if>
</#list>
